| | | **YOU'RE INVITED!**

Dear Peter,

Tomorrow we have a BBQ happening in St. Charles.
We'd love to see you there.

There'll be food, fun, giveaways, silent auction goodies, activities for the kids, Jamie Allman from Radio Free Allman will be our emcee, we will have elected officials from the St. Charles area, and of course, this is a wonderful chance to chat and visit and ask questions if you haven't already.

Click the poster below for details.

We look forward to seeing you if you can make it out!

Courtland and Chanel

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb54763a8e60a183d4559e1276bad8a660dadd612f9841063b960ae8fd4e95384476b7697dcb838053f6c57d23fe1211e56a

Trump Praises Military for Keeping U.S. 'Safe, Strong, Proud'

- The Associated Press

“President Donald Trump on Wednesday praised the U.S. military for keeping America ‘safe, strong, proud, mighty and free’ and used the Independence Day holiday to thank them for being willing to put their lives on the line in defense of the nation,” Darlene Superville writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb54cbd88fa0891e05a53ffc7bed6737d977ac9b6d99fe723b353f1d0a44e04ebc515f05e59bed20af4257b84954f8a2711c

U.S. Added 213,000 Jobs in June, Beating Expectations

- NBC News

“Total nonfarm payroll employment increased to 213,000 jobs in June, the 93rd straight month the number has gone up, the longest recorded streak. It was also higher than the expected gain of 195,000 jobs,” Ben Popken reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb5414c4351046b21b803204bb1aca2c09ce5a586c583aa086de08a9855de81e139f4bbbe1d8e036a795a9c74d54a5c1cf95

‘Abolish ICE’ is a Sign of the Left’s Rising Extremism

- New York Post

The New York Post Editorial Board argues that “the ‘Abolish ICE’ crowd has no actual proposal for what — if anything — should replace it. They just want the agency shut immediately, and we’ll worry later about what comes next.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb545e2f2e722ea4bfec9789d260dc9bc8fda2014f70411a20cab82faff619421312c6c01c0697eb4f0e177ab3a5827688af

Trump Tax Cuts Have Strengthened U.S. Economy

- Tampa Bay Times

The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is fulfilling President Trump’s “critical goals of allowing people to keep more of what they earn and improving the business environment,” Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin writes. “Substantial economic progress and greater prosperity are already being achieved, which will mean more career opportunities, more prosperity, and a safe and secure future for Americans.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb54b1ee1cbff28f735ff04ccf3f7f755d612d8ffa6ed9392c6c8e1c42a4a5adf695d7eb772bbb6b7952d10bd98a51f89778

Trump’s Trade Critics are Wrong -- His Tariffs Could Bring Major Benefits to America

- Fox News

“President Trump has done what any president should do – he’s made it clear that America will not allow the unfair trade practices that have led to enormous trade deficits to continue,” writes Andy Puzder, former CEO of CKE Restaurants. “Changing times require changing policies. Just because America’s trade practices made sense decades ago does not mean these same trade practices make sense in the 21st century.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb543baa5889cf8619895b53ad0bdf44190e6c36fc768bbd28858c0e9c387715e9350241431654f175484ba2db7c964b9f4b

Snapshot: Americans' Views of Job Market Remain Upbeat

- Gallup

According to a new Gallup survey, “Americans continue to recognize a robust U.S. job market, with 65% saying that it is a good time to find a ‘quality job,’” Frank Newport reports. “These are the highest readings in Gallup's 17-year history of tracking this measure of Americans' views of the employment situation.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb54783e150af026064512be589f6860f0042c84ba78bcd220dac831da4e4bb1d9cf63dae484cc1dbc7242954e307cad9ab1
Editorial: Melania Trump Finding Her Voice on Immigration

- Boston Herald

The Boston Herald Editorial Board applauds First Lady Melania Trump for “her efforts to understand the situation on the border and use her position to improve it. She is a smart and accomplished woman and has the unique circumstance of being an immigrant herself.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb5431686574b0a5468596c4bab5bae942f99bad8a6806168ae77757efb4ee70b8fb35d470f452cb4c4747bb463b4552f639
Trump Beats Promise to Cut New Refugees, Down 66% from Obama

- Washington Examiner

“The Trump administration beat the president’s goal of trimming new refugee admissions from the 100,000 brought in by former President Obama, slashing the population by 66 percent. In fact, for the first time, the U.S. resettled fewer refugees than the rest of the world,” Paul Bedard reports in the Washington Examiner.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb543d30f3d1b8b6cb9478044e50c5cf15df5433578c4e80292c91d308f182c010883926a5a1aefb1e2280c8be8cc5db213a
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=719aa29a9b4dcb54abe9cb4f80f2d04125f9b736c9b9b9c2455ea212953b85a4435728c8b68a4b674959504b0b67913374fb403cbab626d2
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48d88daf458bad70694a1bc7eb0b40b3b2ed43c8d1e4a516df7eb8671b488d99e92b93b91f17c1cf0b5d12eac827e00934b741c009d31e5e0
Unsubscribe

body:
Taking on difficult challenges is what this campaign is all about.
#
Peter -
Our campaign's first official fundraising deadline is just a few days away, and we've set an ambitious goal to reach for before it ends. Here it is:
Right now, our campaign has received 7,863 individual donations. But what we're trying to do is reach 10,000.
It will be difficult, no doubt. But taking on difficult challenges is what this campaign is all about, and what my time as Attorney General will be about.
But the common denominator in each instance is you. If you're with me, there's nothing that we can't accomplish -- both in this campaign and when I'm in office. But it has to start with this goal, and that's why I am asking:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to my campaign for Attorney General before our official campaign finance deadline comes to a close? If you can get us off to a strong start, we're going to reach this ambitious goal.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e49/6e822e2f/1be7b1a5/41727a4c/516921440/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180707-full")**
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's win was an earthquake. The message was loud and clear: _the grassroots can beat big money_. And if we hit our goal, we'll send a message that we're next.
Thank you for chipping in today. It means the world to me.
Best,
Zephyr

subject: The Supreme Court of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Last week, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement from the Supreme Court - and what happens next will affect each and every one of us. -------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

Last week, Justice Anthony Kennedy announced his retirement from the Supreme Court - and what happens next will affect each and every one of us.

To me, it's clear. In 2016, the Republican Senate leadership established a precedent when it refused to take up the Supreme Court nomination of Judge Merrick Garland: **Do not fill a Supreme Court vacancy in an election year.**

It is only fair that this precedent should also be applied to the vacancy created by the retirement of Justice Anthony Kennedy only four months before the 2018 election.

**We should not vote on a new Supreme Court Justice before the American people vote in[November.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e35990d/560056388/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS") [Sign my petition if you agree: No Supreme Court vote until the American people vote.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e35990c/560056388/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sign+my+petition+if+you+agree+No+Supreme&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")** | [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359903/560056388/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")
---
We must let the American public speak in [November](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359902/560056388/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+November&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS") about their desires for the direction of the Court and the country. We can _then_ contemplate filling the vacancy.

We are seeing every day that our young people are pushing back against the current direction of this country. These young people deserve a Supreme Court Justice who upholds the law. Who will defend a woman's right to choose, and marriage equality, and health care, and voting rights, and our workers' rights - and the many other issues they care deeply about.

This Justice will represent us _for decades._ In the face of that, I don't think four months is much to ask.

[Please add your name to join me if you agree that we must not vote to fill this seat until AFTER the midterm elections:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359901/560056388/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Please+add+your+name+to+join+me+if+you+a&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")
[**SIGN YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359900/560056388/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")
---
The Constitution explicitly states that when considering Supreme Court nominations, the Senate shall give _advice and consent._

The Senate is an equal branch to the President in this matter. And what's more, the Republicans themselves set the precedent that American voters are as well.

[To me, it's clear: No Supreme Court vote until the American people vote. Click here to sign my petition and join me as we fight this every step of the way.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359907/560056388/VEsB/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+To+me+itrsquos+clear+No+Supreme+Court+vo&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")

Thanks for standing with me,

_Tim_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1273/3e0906/687f0860/3e359906/560056388/VEsO/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/No-Supreme-Court-Nomination?source=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+httpssecuretimkainecomNoSupremeCourtNomi&utm_campaign=20180707_1_PET_TK_Supreme-Court-RS")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Nelson for U
body:

Whichever party wins Senate control could decide the future of **the Supreme Court.** Whether millions of people are kicked off their **health care.** Whether women have **the right to choose.**
